intro: Steam drifts up from a natural spring tucked into the mountainside. Pokemon lounging in the warm water raise their heads and watch you approach.
title: The Hot Spring
description: The Pokemon here have claimed this spring as their own. They will not take coin - but they might let your team soak in exchange for a few Berries as tribute.
query: Offer some Berries for a soak?

1.label: Offer Berries (3)
1.tooltip:
(+) Fully restore the whole party (HP, status, PP, revive)
(-) Costs 3 Berries from your team
1.selected: You set out a handful of Berries. The guardians nod, and let your team slip into the warm water...

2.label: Move on
2.selected: You bow to the spring's keepers and continue up the trail.

soaked: The warm spring works wonders - your whole party is fully restored!
